productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Wanderers Printed Olive Shirt
description: CompositionOlive green printed shirt made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar with a full front button placket, long sleeves with a single buttoned cuff and mid arm buttoned tab, yoked back with top-stitching, one welt pocket on the left chest, branding on left pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentWash and dry inside outDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt will give you a relaxed, easy-going air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
